street.description: Street, drive, or way the turning traffic approaches on; the intersection geocodes from street + cross_street

direction.description: Direction of travel on street that must turn right; empty when the source states none

cross_street.description: Street or way onto which the right turn must be made (the 'onto' target)

location_detail.description: Positional or approach qualifier from the source (e.g. 'at 629 Commonwealth Avenue', 'from municipal parking area')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
